name: John Hickenlooper
subject: 51 stories that keep me going
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper 2020
body:
We've got incredible donors in every corner of the country. | | | [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637717cc/691c9bd/6dd51780/11a4d6ca/1404154280/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_template")
---
| Friend,

I'm asking for your help before tonight.

Tonight at midnight is my final chance to qualify for the first presidential debates. To do that, **I 'm asking everyone reading this message to declare they're a part of this team by chipping in any amount possible--even $1 will do the job.** **[](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637717cc/691c9bd/6dd51780/11a4d6cb/1404154280/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130k-new-donor?refcode=em_fr_20190612_JH_20190612-fr-JH-51supportersbump-newsup_newsup_b1&recurring=auto&amount=1&email=&firstname=&lastname=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** The DNC wants to see that every candidate on the debate stage has a strong base of support that can potentially take on Donald Trump. But when I saw the list of our official supporters, I saw much more.

**Team Hick is a true cross-section of our nation. You are people who work with your hands; with computers and numbers; in classrooms, churches, and out in nature. Many of you are from my tribe: geologists and earth scientists, restaurateurs and brewers, servers, bartenders. (More than a few musicians, too!)**

Some of you are retired or have opted to stay at home. And some of you are folks who are in need of employment--something that's front of mind for me as I think about how to renew the American workforce and rebuild the middle class.

**Below is a small glimpse into our campaign: a round-up of 51 of our supporters, one from every state in the Union as well as Washington, D.C. This team is incomparable --before tonight's deadline, will you join it?** **[](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637717cc/691c9bd/6dd51780/11a4d6c8/1404154280/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130k-new-donor?refcode=em_fr_20190612_JH_20190612-fr-JH-51supportersbump-newsup_newsup_b2&recurring=auto&amount=1&email=&firstname=&lastname=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** A pilot in Alaska

name: Jason Yates
subject: Promise Keepers: A Message for Fathers
body:
| | Peter, What does it entail to be a good Christian father? [Ken Harrison, CEO of Promise Keepers, answers this question and provides powerful truth for fathers](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66icYcIyRhB2URpXghNXmPGvNHENvRAy2kFey2xz3oqHcxMLznKA4xlFe1ZG721zAKqBfUO8cCWWcS2lh_E54czHk&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190613com01&n=1). “This Father’s Day, I’m reminded of a conversation I had with a father like me — a conversation that all fathers need to face. I just got done giving a presentation to a large audience when the usual line of people formed to ask questions or give their input to the talk. Then I noticed the desperate face of a desperate man. “‘I need to talk to you,’ he said. I shook more hands and answered more questions and then as the crowd died down, he and I were able to move to a private corner to grab a few minutes uninterrupted. ‘My wife doesn’t respect me!’ he said. ‘My kids don’t listen to me!’ His face was shrouded in anger, the kind of anger that comes from pain. We settled down for a long conversation.” [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66icYcIyRhB2URpXghNXmPGvNHENvRAy2kFey2xz3oqHcxMLznKA4xlFe1ZG721zAKqBfUO8cCWWcS2lh_E54czHk&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190613com01&n=2) **United. We Stand.** Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190613com01&n=3)

name: Dan Baer
subject: What Pride Means To Me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan for Colorado
body:
That's what I'm fighting for. I believe in the promise of life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness for every person
|
---

| | Hey folks,

I hope June is going well for you!

The month is off to a great start for Team Dan. A big thank you to everyone who has pitched in to help the campaign in the last few weeks. It means a lot. So thank you.

[**We just got our official campaign store up and running. If you 're looking for some Pride gear to wear to a parade, festival, or summer barbeque this month, you should definitely check out our Dan For Colorado Pride shirts. They're pretty great.**](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb8263a/232dfd1/95624c0/62a1700e/2837655959/VEsH/ "https://store.danforcolorado.com/") |
---

On a related note, earlier this month we asked people to share with us what Pride Month means to them, and the answers we've gotten back--from folks in Colorado and across the country-- have been really thoughtful and incredibly inspiring.

We're going to start sharing some of these over [Facebook](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb8263a/232dfd1/95624c0/62a1700c/2837655959/VEsE/ "http://www.facebook.com/DanForColorado/"), [Instagram](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb8263a/232dfd1/95624c0/62a1700d/2837655959/VEsF/ "http://www.instagram.com/danforcolorado/"), and [Twitter](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb8263a/232dfd1/95624c0/62a17032/2837655959/VEsC/ "https://twitter.com/danbbaer") (follow us for updates!), but we wanted to give you a sneak preview of what some folks said before sharing with the general public:

**What does Pride mean to you?**

_\-- "Loving my granddaughter. Unconditionally." \- _Barbara (CA)

_\-- "Pride is being true to yourself and living unabashedly happy regardless of what others may think or say." \- _Ryan (CO)

_\-- "It means that a number of dear friends who are LGBTQ can at last enjoy the exact same rights, privileges, protections and freedoms as anyone else. This is huge and in my opinion it's ABOUT DAGGONE TIME!" \- _Robbi (MI)

**[Those are just a few, but if you want to share yours with us and be featured online, we'd love to hear what Pride means to you.](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb8263a/232dfd1/95624c0/62a17033/2837655959/VEsD/ "https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/s/pride-survey-all?source=20190613_em_fr_b2_baer_all")**

With all this in mind, it seems like a good time to address some of the questions that I've been asked my entire career:

\-- "How do you see the significance of being one of the first openly gay people to be nominated as a U.S. ambassador?"

\-- "What's it like to be a gay cabinet member?"

\-- "Should it matter that you'd be the first openly-gay man in the U.S. Senate?"

Should it matter? No.

Does it matter? Yeah I guess so. But maybe not in the way folks first think it does.

It matters because while I carried around a lot of pain and fear for many years, the empathy forged in the heart of a boy who worried about living an open and happy life has been a gift. I have endeavored to bring that empathy to my life of public service every single day.

And it matters because I believe in the power of progress.

I am the beneficiary of the efforts of so many activists and leaders and advocates who came before me. They made my life possible. Anyone who has been as fortunate as I have been, and who has lived the life I've been blessed to lead can't be cynical about the possibility for progress.

**But progress is only possible if and when we fight for it.**

When we look at our country today, we see powerful people attacking those who have been marginalized their entire lives. People of color. Immigrants. Women. LGBTQ people.

Every day, too many of our fellow Coloradans, too many of our fellow Americans are fighting. They fight for a fair shake in an unfair world. They fight for the equality that has long been denied them.

But these fights are not theirs alone any more than the fight for LGBTQ rights is a fight for LGBTQ people alone. These fights belong to all of us.

**That 's why I'm running for the US Senate. Because the values held dear by communities across our state and our country are under threat. And because we all need to have each other's backs, to take care of one another as we rise to meet this moment we're living through.**

So why does it matter that I would be the first openly-gay man in the U.S. Senate?

It matters because I will never stop fighting for those who aren't getting a fair shake or a fair shot for those who are left out or left behind.

I won't stop fighting for the teacher who can't afford a one bedroom apartment and works a second job but still pours her heart, soul, and wallet into her classroom.

I won't stop fighting for the student who works full-time while getting a degree, all the while staring down the prospect of a lifetime's worth of crippling student loans.

And I won't stop fighting for the woman who watches politicians in Washington try to legislate her body on a daily basis.

That's why I'm here. That's what I'm fighting for. I believe in the promise of life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness for every person-- but I know that in each generation that promise must be advanced and renewed. Thank you for joining me in this fight.

| **[**DONATE**](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb8263a/232dfd1/95624c0/62a17030/2837655959/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/baer-email?refcode=20190613_em_fr_b2_baer_all&amount=19&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**
---

Thanks again for your support.

\-- Dan

|

#
$500 billion, or half a TRILLION. That’s how much Mexican drug cartels bring in every year.

**The cartel business in Mexico is bigger than Walmart. We MUST secure the border and put these cartels out of business.**

[**Add your name to our petition RIGHT NOW if you agree.**](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=16a32a2246&e=02cd889ad3)

| More than 70,000 Americans died from drug overdoses in 2017. If these cartels were launching cruise missiles into cities and killing 70,000 people, I think our response would be a little less measured than it is today.

Customs and Border Patrol officers are doing a great job, apprehending 140,000 people crossing our southern border illegally just this month. However, they need our help to deal with this crisis.

**It’s time for Congress to FINALLY work with President Trump to secure our border – and put these drug cartels out of business – once and for all.**

[**Do you agree? Add your name to our petition right now!**](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=fdb96476db&e=02cd889ad3)

Thank you for everything.

David

name: Jessalyn Reid
subject: America's Dad strikes again
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
| | Derek:

Last week, Senator Kaine and I were in his Richmond office, and he was pointing out from his window all the nearby buildings where he had worked over the years -- including, of course, the Virginia Capitol where he served as Governor. I told him that I loved state capitol buildings, but I'd never been inside Virginia's. Right then and there, he insisted that I stop what I was doing and go take a tour. It was pretty much the most "dad" thing I've experienced since my own dad taught me how to ride a bike 20 years ago. Which brings me to why I'm emailing you today: [**Will you sign our Father's Day card for Tim?**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1771/3e0906/7b187873/3e30811a/3840901209/VEsH/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/add-your-name-to-tims-fathers-day-card?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+Will+you+sign+our+Fathers+Day+card+for+T&utm_campaign=20190613_1_PET_JR_FathersDay2019&source=20190613_1_PET_JR_FathersDay2019")

He might laugh and wave off the whole "America's Dad" nickname, but the truth is that Tim's tendency to treat everyone -- his team, his supporters, his constituents, even strangers! -- with the same thoughtfulness that he treats his own kids is exactly what makes him such a great leader for Virginia and for our country. So let's make sure he knows how grateful we are to have him in the Senate fighting for us! [**Click here to add your name to his Father's Day card (there's even a space to leave a personal note, if you want).**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1771/3e0906/7b187873/3e308119/3840901209/VEsE/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/add-your-name-to-tims-fathers-day-card?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+Click+here+to+add+your+name+to+his+Fathe&utm_campaign=20190613_1_PET_JR_FathersDay2019&source=20190613_1_PET_JR_FathersDay2019") I'll share the responses we get with him this weekend, and I know he'd love to see your name on there.

Thanks for being on Team TK.

-Jess

Jessalyn Reid
Team Kaine
| ****[**SIGN THE CARD**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1771/3e0906/7b187873/3e308118/3840901209/VEsF/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/add-your-name-to-tims-fathers-day-card?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=3+-+SIGN+THE+CARD&utm_campaign=20190613_1_PET_JR_FathersDay2019&source=20190613_1_PET_JR_FathersDay2019")****
---

(I did know that... because of my tour!)

name: Drew Godinich
subject: Love is love
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sri for Congress
body:
Friends, Happy Pride!

During the month of June, the LGBTQ+ community comes together to celebrate that love is love.

Our campaign is about bringing people in, not pushing them away. Yet this Administration continuously attacks the rights of our LGBTQ+ community.

**[We must come together to reject bigotry and hate and fight back against Trump 's anti-LGBTQ+ agenda. Sri and I are all in, are you?](https://act.myngp.com/el/g-33MPtf3M2qMTA4rrjZNVsGAecHLMb-96DUVT9kxkA=/OQyy3GF2HfpDVmo2a0ytZx7SCOFiR3uLF35t0IBL4Sk=)**

The Trump Administration is relentless in their attacks. Just a few weeks ago, they rolled back protections for transgender Americans. And now they also are allowing doctors to refuse to provide treatment to LGBTQ+ people.

**[We 've come too far to let this Administration take us backwards. Are you with us?](https://act.myngp.com/el/g-33MPtf3M2qMTA4rrjZNVsGAecHLMb-96DUVT9kxkA=/OQyy3GF2HfpDVmo2a0ytZx7SCOFiR3uLF35t0IBL4Sk=)**

**[](https://act.myngp.com/el/g-33MPtf3M2qMTA4rrjZNVsGAecHLMb-96DUVT9kxkA=/OQyy3GF2HfpDVmo2a0ytZx7SCOFiR3uLF35t0IBL4Sk=)**

With pride,

Drew Godinich, Campaign Manager

subject: F-35 Over Washington: President Trump’s Excellent Message to Friend and Foe
body:
"President Trump was right on Wednesday to order an F-35B strike fighter overflight of Washington, D.C. The display was a gesture to visiting..." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=71e74c8319&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **F-35 Over Washington: President Trump’s Excellent Message to Friend and Foe**

“President Trump was right on Wednesday to order an F-35B strike fighter overflight of Washington, D.C. The display was a gesture to visiting Polish President Andrzej Duda. Poland intends to buy a number of F-35s,” Tom Rogan writes in the _Washington Examiner_.

“But this flypast also sends a broader message to the world . . . It's better to be an American friend than an American enemy. Coupled to the better offer of U.S. economic and political friendship, Trump should keep up this very modern gunboat diplomacy.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6347370803&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “President Donald Trump’s use of tariffs to pressure Mexico into taking responsibility for its role in the border crisis is a game-changer,” National Border Patrol Council President Brandon Judd writes in [_USA Today_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ebd7373a39&e=3ee4985eea). “For many years, the Mexican government refused our requests to deter people from crossing the border illegally, and even actively encouraged the exodus of its most impoverished citizens . . . President Trump reversed decades of American passivity toward Mexico’s intransigence.”
---
|
---
| “Executives of 60 foreign companies signed on June 12 the ‘Pledge to America’s Workers,’ committing to provide more than 930,000 training and apprenticeship opportunities in the United States,” Emel Akan reports in [_The Epoch Times_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=150d90e324&e=3ee4985eea). “There’s no better place to exist today and tomorrow than in the United States of America,” Ivanka Trump said at the SelectUSA Investment Summit in Washington yesterday.
---
|
---
| “Under the leadership of House Speaker Nancy Pelosi, D-Calif., and House Democrats, the 116th Congress has refused to so much as entertain anything to address the border, including funding for the Unaccompanied Alien Child Program run by the Department of Health and Human Services, because my Democratic colleagues fear giving the president and the minority party a ‘win,’” Rep. Chip Roy (R-TX) writes in [Fox News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1b8bb4e4ea&e=3ee4985eea). “The truth to anyone being honest with themselves is that there is a humanitarian problem. It is far past time this body addressed it.” ([_The New York Times_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2802bf5cae&e=3ee4985eea) agrees.)
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ee117fb0df&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=618c540f06&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=a09e4e83d7)
---

[**_That 's why we're demanding Senate Republicans stop stalling on equal pay. It's time to end wage discrimination once and for all! ->_**](https://act.myngp.com/el/Xup9y5R5fvZLQuTE1P841y34ZEkpp5eZa6kD3jDK-lE=/yHKHVo4Cq3M7URVWZhm4gjHAFzpJSAqmyxgGEM8TFuk=)

> Peter,
>
> This week we celebrate the 56th anniversary of the Equal Pay Act, an important step forward in the fight for gender equality. But today, the gender pay gap still exists and has even worsened in recent years.
>
> I was proud to be an original co-sponsor of this year's Paycheck Fairness Act, aimed at closing loopholes in the original Equal Pay Act.
>
> [**_The Senate has stalled on this critical legislation. In honor of this week 's anniversary, I'm asking 2,000 supporters to sign on and demand equal pay once and for all:_**](https://act.myngp.com/el/Xup9y5R5fvZLQuTE1P841y34ZEkpp5eZa6kD3jDK-lE=/yHKHVo4Cq3M7URVWZhm4gjHAFzpJSAqmyxgGEM8TFuk=)

> ---
> Women are too often shortchanged for the work they do. We must step up and keep fighting until equal pay for equal work is a reality.
>
> [**_Add your name to demand the Senate pass pay equity._**](https://act.myngp.com/el/Xup9y5R5fvZLQuTE1P841y34ZEkpp5eZa6kD3jDK-lE=/yHKHVo4Cq3M7URVWZhm4gjHAFzpJSAqmyxgGEM8TFuk=)

> Mike

subject: I'm furious
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Markey Committee
body:
| |

| Hello,

One year ago this week, President Donald Trump's FCC rolled back net neutrality protections.

And this week, Senate Majority Leader Mitch McConnell blocked another attempt to vote to restore net neutrality.

Senator McConnell is bowing to the will of giant broadband companies and living up to his nickname as the "Grim Reaper" of Democratic proposals in the Senate. It makes me furious.

But what Senator McConnell isn't counting on is the grassroots pressure from supporters like you who want to save net neutrality, and we need to make him feel the pressure IMMEDIATELY.

_**[Before the end of the week, we need to raise another $15,000 to launch ads against Mitch McConnell and turn up the pressure to demand a vote. Will you pitch in to our Media Fund now and help us fight?](http://ma.edmarkey. |

| | We need you to know 3 things:
1) Mitch McConnell dubbed himself the "grim reaper" \-- and announced he'll block every single progressive Democratic proposal if Republicans hold the Senate.
2) Colorado is Democrats' only chance at flipping the Senate in 2020.
3) Dan is our best candidate to win this race and finally oust McConnell.
We don't mean to sound the alarm -- but even if we take the White House back from Trump, we need to flip the Senate blue. If not, we'll be stuck with Mitch McConnell's obstructionism for two more years. **There 's a lot on the line:** The Supreme Court and their decisions on reproductive rights. name: Dick Durbin
subject: Mitch McConnell is blocking 2020 election security measures
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
#
**[SIGN ON: It's time to protect our elections from foreign interference.](http://action.dickdurbin.com/page/m/45ff4cac/42ab3cf4/6325d271/135d6813/3495170675/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjM0MjIzIiwiSlNWR1NWSlRWRTVCVFVVbEpRPT0iOiJQZXRlciJ9/ "https://durbin.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/secure-our-elections?source=em190613&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter")**
Peter,
Special Counsel Robert Mueller made it clear in his report: Russia interfered in the 2016 election to help elect President Trump. As if that wasn't shocking enough, just yesterday, the President admitted that he would accept foreign help again to secure his reelection in 2020.
With our democracy under direct attack, protecting our elections from foreign interference should be a top priority for all of us. Majority Leader McConnell must stop standing in the way.
**[We must keep up the fight. Add your name now to support protecting our 2020 elections.](http://action.dickdurbin.com/page/m/45ff4cac/42ab3cf4/6325d271/135d6813/3495170675/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjM0MjIzIiwiSlNWR1NWSlRWRTVCVFVVbEpRPT0iOiJQZXRlciJ9/ "https://durbin.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/secure-our-elections?source=em190613&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter")**
While I'm proud that the Senate passed my election security bill--the DETER Act--this is only a small, first step. We still have more to do to stop foreign interference from disrupting our elections. But Majority Leader McConnell is blocking our efforts to protect our democracy.
The integrity of our democracy depends on the idea that every vote is counted fairly--without any outside interference in our elections. If we act now, we can stand up for our democratic values and fight back in 2020.
**[Protect your vote and the integrity of our 2020 elections. Sign on now to join the fight.](http://action.dickdurbin.com/page/m/45ff4cac/42ab3cf4/6325d271/135d6813/3495170675/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjM0MjIzIiwiSlNWR1NWSlRWRTVCVFVVbEpRPT0iOiJQZXRlciJ9/ "https://durbin.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/secure-our-elections?source=em190613&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter")**
My best,
Dick Durbin
**[Add My Name](http://action.dickdurbin.com/page/m/45ff4cac/42ab3cf4/6325d271/135d6813/3495170675/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjM0MjIzIiwiSlNWR1NWSlRWRTVCVFVVbEpRPT0iOiJQZXRlciJ9/ "https://durbin.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/secure-our-elections?source=em190613&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter")**

| Friend,

_Thank you._

The last few days have been a sprint to make sure John qualifies for the first presidential debate in two weeks. **Thanks to your generosity and support, John has secured a spot on the debate stage in Miami.**

Take a minute to give yourselves a hand. You deserve it. [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637717c1/691c9bd/6dd73b48/11a4d72c/661891078/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130k-new-donor?refcode=em_fr_20190613_TH_20190613-su-TH-volask-all_all_i1&recurring=auto&email=&firstname=&lastname=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&occupation=&employer=") Now, as we ramp up our efforts to get John's message out before the debates, we need your help in a new way.

name: James Mackler
subject: Pride Month
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James Mackler for U
body:
Tell Mitch McConnell to bring the Equality Act up for a vote.
|
---
[ ](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa2b5/18d6a294/4a0d65fd/26d68a83/121504220/VEsH/ "https://www.jamesmackler.com/")

| | Friends, We've come a long way in the fight for equality for LGBTQ Americans. I am proud to have gotten to know and work alongside so many wonderful LGBTQ friends, family members, and neighbors. I am even more proud to stand with them in calling for equality for all. Last month, the House of Representatives passed the Equality Act, would extend key provisions of the Civil Rights Act to include sexual orientation and gender identity. But right now, Mitch McConnell has refused to put the bill on the Senate floor. [**_Tell Mitch McConnell to bring the Equality Act up for a vote._**](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa2b5/18d6a294/4a0d65fd/26d68a80/121504220/VEsE/ "https://secure.jamesmackler.com/e190613") My father-in-law shares a loving relationship with his husband, whom he was able to marry after 23 years of being together. It pains me to think that the two of them can still be discriminated against. I want my two daughters to grow up in a world where no one can legally discriminate against their grandfathers. I want my daughters to be proud of who they are, and respectful of all people regardless of their sexual orientation or gender. | [](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa2b5/18d6a294/4a0d65fd/26d68a80/121504220/VEsF/ "https://secure.jamesmackler.com/e190613")
---
No one should have to live in fear of being fired or discriminated against because of who they are or who they love. It shouldn't matter which state they live in, members of the LGBTQ community need equal rights and equal protections under the law. As it stands now, that isn't the case.
This Pride Month, while we celebrate the progress our country has made, we must also remember the sacrifices so many made to get us to this point. And we should honor them by advancing non-discrimination protections for LGBTQ individuals nationwide.
[**_This is long overdue. Call on Mitch McConnell to pass the Equality Act once and for all._**](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa2b5/18d6a294/4a0d65fd/26d68a80/121504220/VEsC/ "https://secure.jamesmackler.com/e190613")
Thank you,
James

|

subject: What's wrong with politics
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Joan Perry for Congress, All rights reserved
body:
When you learn the truth, you'll agree that my opponent's DC insiders are what's wrong with politics. Their ad is misleading and outright hypocrisy. | | | | [ ](https://drjoanperry.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=40b941504fba213abdaddc0bc&id=c17faa06ed&e=0bf1d0f47f)
---
| | | Today, my opponent’s DC insiders falsely attacked me yet again, this time spending more than $130,000 in an outrageous and misleading ad. If you will stand with me, [I could really use your help.](https://drjoanperry.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=40b941504fba213abdaddc0bc&id=d6b225640b&e=0bf1d0f47f)

**When you find out the truth, you'll agree this ad is what's wrong with politics. It's misleading and outright hypocrisy.**

That's why I'm calling on my opponent to hold himself to the same standard he asked of me. Dr. Greg Murphy knows this attack is false, and he should disavow the ad today -- just as I did last week.

Here's the amazing part: Dr. Murphy's DC insiders attacked me for having the [EXACT SAME CONCERNS](https://drjoanperry.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=40b941504fba213abdaddc0bc&id=c06239e2e8&e=0bf1d0f47f) they had themselves. Don't take my word for it; you can see their position for yourself here:
---
| [ ](https://drjoanperry.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=40b941504fba213abdaddc0bc&id=b3bb1f8485&e=0bf1d0f47f)
---
| Constitutional conservatives recognize that Congress should fund the wall and protect our border. That's how we solve this problem for good, and that's _always_ been my position. After I researched the emergency powers of the President, I unequivocally supported his actions. I've said so numerous times. For anyone to say otherwise is a lie.

But the truth hasn't stopped them from attacking me, because they are trying to hide [Greg Murphy's consistent support for government-run healthcare](https://drjoanperry.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=40b941504fba213abdaddc0bc&id=c6d672729a&e=0bf1d0f47f) and his plan to expand Obamacare's budget-busting entitlement program. And he knows it.

He knows I have supported President Trump from Day 1 and agree with his decision to declare a national emergency. He knows I believe we must build a physical border wall. And he knows I've said we have a national crisis on our southern border. That's why he should renounce this ad.

Greg Murphy should also know his DC insiders misrepresented my support of Mike McIntyre in 2012. Mike, Jimbo, and I have been in Bible studies together for over 30 years. He helped my husband start the Christian Legal Society at UNC-CH. Mike had the highest endorsement from the NRA and was endorsed by the National Right to Life for his 100% pro-life voting record. **He voted against Obamacare and even voted against Nancy Pelosi in 2011 before my endorsement**. That does not mean that I agree with all of Mike’s positions, but I know him to be a sincere Christian. I am a committed Republican and believe in the conservative, constitutional values that make our nation great. That's who I am and how I will vote in Congress if elected.

To be a courageous representative, you must be willing to stand up to DC insiders. That is what I did already, and Greg Murphy owes it to the voters to renounce this ad and stop the lies coming out for his campaign.

Sincerely,

Dr. Joan Perry

PS: I need your help to battle this smear campaign. Can you pitch in today?

name: BernieSanders.com
subject: An important ask after yesterday’s speech. This matters.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bernie 2020
body:
While they laugh, they are all envious.

# [](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/8915?t=1&akid=1688%2E150750%2E-KNAb3)
**Make a contribution to our campaign before our critical FEC fundraising deadline comes to a close. This is an important request, especially after yesterday’s speech. Chip in today:**
[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/12469?refcode=em190613-1-v1-60&t=2&akid=1688%2E150750%2E-KNAb3)

* * *
They laughed.
According to one reporter, when several of our opponents heard Bernie was giving a speech about democratic socialism, they laughed.
And make no mistake about it, they weren’t laughing at Bernie — they were laughing at us.
* They were laughing at the idea that we should even try to take on the insurance companies to guarantee health care as a right.
* They were laughing at the idea that we have a moral obligation to take on the fossil fuel industry to save this planet for future generations.
* They were laughing at the idea that it is possible for all Americans, no matter their economic status, to have the opportunity for higher education.

But while they laugh, they are all envious — they are envious of the size and strength of our grassroots movement. And what they don’t seem to recognize is that the values we share are the source of that strength.
So ahead of our critical FEC fundraising deadline, we have an important request — one more important today than ever before:
[**Can Bernie count on you to make a $3 contribution to our campaign as a way of saying you are more committed than ever to take on the billionaire class and elect a government that works for all of us, and not just the one percent?**](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/12469?refcode=em190613-1-v1-60&t=27&akid=1688%2E150750%2E-KNAb3)
Now some of these people who laugh need three polls and a focus group to tell them how they should talk about fundamental issues like health care.
It’s embarrassing.
But not Bernie. Not us. We are going to be honest about what is happening in America today and the steps we need to take to turn things around for everyone who lives here.
And that is why we are going to win.
But Bernie can’t do it alone:
**Make a $3 contribution ahead of our critical FEC fundraising deadline:**
[**https://act.berniesanders.com/go/contribute](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/12469?refcode=em190613-1-v1-60&t=28&akid=1688%2E150750%2E-KNAb3)**
Thanks for stepping up and chipping in on the heels of Bernie’s big speech. It’s a pretty important day to say we’re all in this together.
All my best,
Faiz Shakir
Campaign Manager
[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/12469?refcode=em190613-1-v1-60&t=29&akid=1688%2E150750%2E-KNAb3)

Paid for by Bernie 2020
PO BOX 391, Burlington, VT 05402
This email was sent to **dpwillis67@gmail.com**. If you need to, [**unsubscribe here**](https://bernie.actionkit.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=30&akid=1688%2E150750%2E-KNAb3). You can also [sign up to receive fewer emails](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/fewer-emails/?t=31&akid=1688%2E150750%2E-KNAb3). We hope you'll stay, because emails are such an important part of how we organize and how we raise money. In fact, there is no single greater source for our campaign's fundraising than emails like this one. And that's important, because no one person, not even Bernie Sanders, can take on Trump and the billionaire class alone.

Before you go about the rest of your day, help power our fight against the billionaire class by [making a contribution today](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bernie-email-template?refcode=em-footer&t=32&refcode2=1688_150750_-KNAb3&akid=1688%2E150750%2E-KNAb3).

name: Teresa
subject: House Democrats have a duty to the Constitution
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TERESA TOMLINSON FOR SENATE
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/74264/images/tt2020%20email%20header.png]
Dear Friend –

This weekend I made my position clear: whether Republicans in the Senate let him off the hook or not, the president has committed high crimes that are destabilizing to our democracy. The time to begin impeachment proceedings is NOW. Yesterday, he proved why with a disturbing admission to ABC News that he would utilize foreign interference in his campaign to attack a political opponent.

These unprecedented claims should be the alarm bells ringing for every House Democrat still on the fence about impeachment. Too often, Democrats lose because we lack a clear, bold vision for what our leadership would look like when elected. Voters often wonder, “what does this politician really believe?”

As your U.S. Senator, you’ll never have to wonder where I stand.

If you agree the time to stand up for what we believe is NOW, chip in and help me show Georgia and the nation what real Senate leadership looks like.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Express Donate $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/impeachment-hearings?refcode=em061319-2a&amount=3&express_lane=true]

Express Donate $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/impeachment-hearings?refcode=em061319-2a&amount=10&express_lane=true]

Express Donate $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/impeachment-hearings?refcode=em061319-2a&amount=25&express_lane=true]

Express Donate $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/impeachment-hearings?refcode=em061319-2a&amount=50&express_lane=true]

Express Donate $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/impeachment-hearings?refcode=em061319-2a&amount=250&express_lane=true]

Or, donate another amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/impeachment-hearings?refcode=em061319-2a&noskip=true]

But holding elected officials who abuse their power accountable is just the start. We need to enact policies that improve people’s lives.

No American should work full-time and still struggle to make ends meet. That’s why I support raising the minimum wage to $15 per hour.

Almost every day now we see devastating floods, fires, hurricanes, droughts, and tornadoes. That’s why I support bold action to combat climate change.

Demonizing refugees - mostly women and children - who are fleeing rampant crime and economic desolation is not immigration policy. That’s why I support comprehensive immigration reform and a pathway to citizenship for DREAMers.

And allowing Republicans to strip women of the freedom to make their most private healthcare decisions goes against basic human rights. That’s why I support federal legislation protecting women’s reproductive freedom.
.
Make a donation of any amount to my campaign today if you’re with me. We need your help to win Georgia and flip the Senate blue. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/impeachment-hearings?refcode=em061319-2a&noskip=true]

Yours Truly,

Teresa Tomlinson
Proud Georgian. Proud Democrat.

name: Greg Stanton
subject: Re: Jon Stewart
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/sDwH6GgvWqqbJVhIIVL1UHvfZ293Rfl_LaAj-RjtvTQ=/JHLD-fkSIN6VDYmv1qSV3RIU1YPhKX1QUl6-bWJDfCc=)

Like many of you, I was touched by Jon Stewart's testimony before the House Judiciary Committee this week in support of securing permanent funding for the Victims' Compensation Fund that provides healthcare funding for 9/11 first responders.

**The men and women who risked their lives to save thousands on that tragic day are American heroes and they deserve to be taken care of by our country**.

That's why I am proud to be a co-sponsor of HR 1327, which will permanently fund the VCF to support healthcare for the brave and patriotic first responders to the 9/11 attacks.

[**Will you add your name to my petition calling on Congress to UNANIMOUSLY pass HR 1327?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/sDwH6GgvWqqbJVhIIVL1UHvfZ293Rfl_LaAj-RjtvTQ=/JHLD-fkSIN6VDYmv1qSV3RIU1YPhKX1QUl6-bWJDfCc=)

As Stewart testified to Congress, these heroes did their jobs 18 years ago, now it is time for Congress to do its job.

**We must fund healthcare for 9/11 first responders.**

[**Add Your Name to tell Congress to come together to support our American heroes who risked it all for our country on 9/11 >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/sDwH6GgvWqqbJVhIIVL1UHvfZ293Rfl_LaAj-RjtvTQ=/JHLD-fkSIN6VDYmv1qSV3RIU1YPhKX1QUl6-bWJDfCc=)

Thank you,

\-- _Greg _

name: Take Action (via Conole for Congress)
subject: protect gold star families
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Conole for Congress
body:
| [](conoleforcongress.com)
---

| | John Katko voted for Trump's tax bill. As a consequence, our deficit and taxes on working-class families who lost a soldier to war have increased -- to pay for a massive tax cut for the wealthiest Americans and big corporations.

[**Join us here to demand that John Katko apologizes to every veteran family who pays more taxes because of his vote.**](https://conole.bsd. "https://conole.bsd.net/page/s/sign-on-katko-vote?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=1+-+Join+us+here+to+demand+that+John+Katko+a&utm_campaign=FC_EM_PT_90DO_190613_1_2&source=FC_EM_PT_90DO_190613_1_2&refcode=FC_EM_PT_90DO_190613_1_2")

**Begin forwarded message:**

In 2017, John Katko voted for Trump's tax bill, which increased our deficit by giving trillion dollar tax cuts to corporations and the ultra-wealthy.

**Heartbreakingly, the legislation also significantly raised taxes for working-class families receiving death benefits because a parent died in combat.**

When I'm elected, I promise to fight to make sure that the legislation that gets through Congress helps real Americans, not special interests who act like they can buy our government.

[**Add your name here to demand that John Katko apologize to every family who lost a soldier and are paying more taxes thanks to his vote.**](https://conole.bsd. "https://conole.bsd.net/page/s/sign-on-katko-vote?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=2+-+Add+your+name+here+to+demand+that+John+K&utm_campaign=FC_EM_PT_90DO_190613_1_2&source=FC_EM_PT_90DO_190613_1_2&refcode=FC_EM_PT_90DO_190613_1_2")

Our urgent mission is to build a grassroots campaign that can win in November so that we can get to work serving the people and fighting against bills like this.

To make that a reality, we all need to stand together. That starts with taking action.

[**Sign here to join me in taking a stand against John Katko 's vote to raise taxes for families who lost a soldier in combat so that the wealthiest Americans could get a tax cut they didn't need.**](https://conole.bsd. "https://conole.bsd.net/page/s/sign-on-katko-vote?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=3+-+Sign+here+to+join+me+in+taking+a+stand+a&utm_campaign=FC_EM_PT_90DO_190613_1_2&source=FC_EM_PT_90DO_190613_1_2&refcode=FC_EM_PT_90DO_190613_1_2")

Yours in service,

Francis |
---|---|---

|
---

_This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Francis Conole is running to represent New York 's 24th Congressional District to bring fresh leadership to Central NY. A fourth-generation Syracusan and Iraq War veteran, he has dedicated his life to service and sacrifice. You can learn more about his mission by liking us on **[Facebook](https://conole.bsd.net/page/m/c82b02d/388db0e9/841d1fb/609a9e0b/4112217880/VEsC/ "https://www.facebook.com/conole4congress/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=4+-+Facebook&utm_campaign=FC_EM_PT_90DO_190613_1_2&source=FC_EM_PT_90DO_190613_1_2&refcode=FC_EM_PT_90DO_190613_1_2")** and following us on **[Twitter](https://conole.bsd.net/page/m/c82b02d/388db0e9/841d1fb/609a9e0a/4112217880/VEsD/ "https://twitter.com/Conole4Congress?lang=en&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=5+-+Twitter&utm_campaign=FC_EM_PT_90DO_190613_1_2&source=FC_EM_PT_90DO_190613_1_2&refcode=FC_EM_PT_90DO_190613_1_2")**. **[Click here to contribute to our campaign.](https://conole.bsd. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fc-footer?refcode=footer&amount=15&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=6+-+Click+here+to+contribute+to+our+campaign&utm_campaign=FC_EM_PT_90DO_190613_1_2&source=FC_EM_PT_90DO_190613_1_2")**

We're relying on grassroots supporters like you. * A chance to meet Beto!

name: Education Alert (Beshear for Kentucky)
subject: The future of public education is hanging in the balance
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beshear/Coleman 2019
body:
The courts just dealt Kentucky's public schools a devastating blow.
|
---
[ ](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557b77/ad6dc73/151d1e52/db4e6b1/4291413621/VEsH/ "https://andybeshear.com/")

| | Peter --

We just got word that **a court ruling has handed Matt Bevin the reins to our public schools**. The court ruled that Bevin can unilaterally reshape the Board of Education, giving him an unprecedented amount of power over Kentucky teachers and students. This puts thousands of teachers at the mercy of someone who has bullied them, called them names, and tried to cut their retirements. | | **[FIGHT BACK -- DONATE NOW](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557b77/ad6dc73/151d1e52/db4e6b6/4291413621/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhhVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEyOCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-education?refcode=20190613.1nd__128__&amount=5")**

subject: It's official!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:
| |
---
| Team,

The DNC just announced that Michael officially qualified for the first Democratic debate. We couldn't have done this without you!

Your energy, your support, and your hard work got us to this day. We're so thankful to have you on this team.

Michael is extraordinarily grateful for the opportunity to address millions of Americans from center stage, but this campaign isn't just about being on television.

It's about conversations in living rooms and coffee shops and college campuses.

We have a lot of work to do to turn Michael's vision of building opportunity for every American and restoring integrity to our government into a reality.

But tonight, take a moment to celebrate.

Tomorrow, the work continues.

Team Bennet

name: Wilmot Collins
subject: Why I'm running for Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by A whole lot of folks for Wilmot Collins, PO Box 458, Helena, MT 59624
body:
#
Team,
I'm running for U.S. Senate because I have lived in Montana for 25 years now, and I have never in my lifetime seen the people being left behind the way we are today.
From the tariffs impacting Montana's farmers to the attacks on affordable health care for people with pre-existing conditions, to the dangers of climate change and dark money, what's going on in Washington is hurting our families here at home.
Montana has one great representative in Jon Tester, but he can't do this alone and Montana needs a second Senator to help fight for us. As the next Senator of this great state, I'll always put Montana's families first and will fight for our values every single day.
[**Are you with me, team? Contribute $5 to my campaign now.**](https://act.wilmotcollins. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wc-email?refcode=em190613&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
Most people that run for office are millionaires, but not me. I'm a regular Montanan, and I understand from experience what it's like for working people here and around the country.
As Mayor of Helena, I have always led with sincerity, transparency, and care for our community. I'll take those same values with me to Washington to fight for our families in the Senate.
Montanans need public servants--not politicians. My campaign for Senate is offering something different, because "business as usual" just isn't working for our families. It's leaving us behind.
[**Montanans deserve better, and together, we 'll ensure they get it. Chip in $5 now.**](https://act.wilmotcollins. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wc-email?refcode=em190613&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
Thank you,
Wilmot

**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.wilmotcollins. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wc-email?refcode=em190613&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
